candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; populated and identical to Total Revenue in preview.

Non-core other income, not total revenue.

candidates.why: Disposal loss, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Investment income, not sales revenue.

candidates.why: Direct production input cost on the income statement; best match for cost of goods sold.

candidates.why: Operating overhead/service cost component above operating result; fits SG&A-style overhead bucket.
Core operating overhead component above operating result.

Balance sheet accrual, not direct P&L row for SG&A mapping.

Capitalized balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped the dedicated R&D line. It appears below the operating result area, so it is not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS to avoid mixing below-EBIT disclosures into operating overhead.

candidates.why: Net finance cost total, but less preferred than underlying recurring components when components exist.

candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest disclosure; avoid double counting if main row is selected.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance cost components over total Financial expenses. Excluded FX loss, balancing rows, and supplemental duplicate lease-interest disclosure.

candidates.row_label: Tax Related to Invested Unrestricted Equity Fund
candidates.why: Tax item, not equity.
Income statement line, not book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.

Also an equity total line, but explicitly combines equity and minority interest; less preferred for BE when MIB is separate.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is shown. Using Total equity as BE and setting MIB to empty to avoid double counting. Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest appears identical, suggesting no separate minority interest is present.

candidates.why: Combined total, not a standalone minority interest/non-controlling interest row.
